passives.name: Drain
passives.effects: Restore {{as|1 mana}} every second. Dealing damage to an enemy champion increases the restoration to {{as|2 mana}} for the next 5 seconds. If you cannot gain mana, {{tip|healing|heal}} for{{ft|45% of the value|{{as|{{ap|1*0.45}}|hp}} every second, increased to {{as|{{ap|2*0.45}}|hp}} when dealing damage to an enemy champion}}instead.

passives.name: Helping Hand
passives.effects: Basic attacks deal {{as|5 '''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]] against [[minions]].

effects_structured.raw: Dealing damage to an enemy champion increases the restoration to {{as 2 mana}} for the next 5 seconds
If you cannot gain mana, {{tip healing heal}} for{{ft 45% of the value {{as {{ap 1*0.45}} hp}} every second, increased to {{as {{ap 2*0.45}} hp}} when dealing damage to an enemy champion}}instead.
Basic attacks deal {{as 5 '''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]] against [[minions]].

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified Drain/Helping Hand behavior from page-level source: Drain restores 1 mana per second, upgrades to 2 mana per second for 5 seconds after dealing damage to an enemy champion, and converts to 45% healing when mana cannot be gained (including full-mana states).
Player-visible behavior: Helping Hand is an on-hit-only minion damage rider and does not apply to non-minion targets.
